comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Contains at least 9 behavioral tests covering: literal path detection, variable path detection, source command exclusion, script-to-script exclusion, exemption comment handling, exit codes, clean file acceptance, multi-pattern detection, scope filtering
- [ ] All tests fail (RED) because check-shim-refs.sh does not yet exist
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_exit_nonzero_on_literal_path]
- [ ] Tests use fixture files (temp dir with test content) rather than relying on real repo files
